initiatives.name: Trans Queer Youth NOLA
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support for trans and queer youth in New Orleans. They coordinate direct assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through youth empowerment, mental health support, and creating affirming spaces for queer and trans youth to thrive.

initiatives.name: Common Ground Relief
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization coordinating mutual aid and environmental justice initiatives in New Orleans. They organize direct support through wetlands restoration, native plant propagation, and environmental education while building community resilience through ecological stewardship and climate adaptation.

initiatives.name: Below Sea Level Aid
initiatives.description: Below Sea Level Aid is a community-driven harm reduction organization dedicated to supporting our neighbors in New Orleans, Louisiana, and the surrounding parishes.

initiatives.name: TRYSTEREO
initiatives.description: Trystereo is an all-volunteer harm reduction collective based in New Orleans, Louisiana.

initiatives.name: Greater New Orleans Caring Collective
initiatives.description: We help our neighbors receive vital essentials for daily life such as food, transportation and more.
